skill_buffs.skill: Vagan's crafting bench to complete Incubators
skill_buffs.raw: Vagan's crafting bench to complete Incubators now has a more descriptive label for what interacting with the crafting bench will do.

skill_buffs.skill: Added the "Currency" stash tab affinity to the following items
skill_buffs.raw: Added the "Currency" stash tab affinity to the following items: Refracting Fog, Volatile Vaal Orb, Crystallised Rancour, Coin of Restoration, Coin of Desecration, Coin of Knowledge, Coin of Power, Coin of Skill. Added the "Essence" stash tab affinity to the Essence of Desolation.
